en: Add h-full to sidebar-main for member list height
Resolve client socket.io-parser vulnerability
Resolve socket.io-parser and fast-xml-parser vulnerabilities
Member list not filling full height
Invite-to-server via DM with workspace picker + member role update
DM call accept not emitting to server and invite-to-server not wired up
Add mobile/tablet responsive layout with sidebar drawer and mobile header
Poll Microsoft OAuth status after opening external browser
Add animations, skeletons, and polish for modern Discord-like feel
Hide desktop menu bar and add stay signed in option
Fix Ubuntu taskbar icon, pinning, and multi-size icons
Replace StorageEvent with Event to resolve CodeQL superfluous args finding
Resolve all 84 CodeQL code quality findings
Add per-route rate limits to file attachment routes
Set Linux WM_CLASS so taskbar icon shows Boxcord logo
Add per-route rate limits to channel, dm, reaction, and push routes
Resolve CodeQL SSRF and missing rate-limiting alerts
Remove stale package-lock.json files, dismiss all Dependabot alerts
Add security resolutions to client package.json
Resolve high severity vulnerabilities (flatted, undici)
Auto-generate changelog from conventional commits
